sfa-0.1.0.description:
# Initial Release
- Contains locations and items up to DarkIce Mines
- Randomize shop items, contains option to include maps to buy in the shop
- Fast Krystal intro. Game starts with the Krazoa Spirit and open path, you just need to go straight to release the first Krazoa Spirit
- Start on Dinosaur Planet with staff already equipped. SharpClaws spawn in ThornTail Hollow and the Queen is waiting for White GrubTubs quest

**Goal after defeating Galdon Boss**

## Known Issues
- Flying out of DarkIce Mines is prone to crashing. Save before leaving the planet. Warping directly to `World Map` or `ThornTail Hollow - Outside` can work better in that case
- Silver and Gold Keys from DarkIce Mines doesn't work correctly with randomizer so the inside of DIM is staying vanila
sfa-0.1.0.title: Star Fox Adventures v0.1.0

sfa-0.1.1.description:
Compatible with seeds generated in 0.1.0

- Fixed `Beside Warpstone Fuel Cell Right` bomb plant requirements
- Fixed `DIM SharpClaw Bridge Cogs` being already placed before accessing the cannon
- Fixed MP upgrades not syncing right away after getting a `Magic Upgrade` location
sfa-0.1.1.title: Star Fox Adventures v0.1.1
